evidence.page_title: Tejas : Story of a pie in the sky. | Page 5 - Pakistan Defence
evidence.title: Tejas : Story of a pie in the sky.
evidence.description: This is a report by Comptroller and Auditor General (CAG) of India,an independent,constitutional body. Too much for you to comprehend ? Dont BS, we know India loves to make things up and use those institution name as cover up. Those instituition can claim how independent they are. End of the...
evidence.text:
Well sir,the fact is that CAG never says that Tejas is only 35% indigenous,in fact in they give the indigenous content as 61% in the annexure of the same report.Its a claim taken out of the context.
CAG says if the use of imported components in the Indian developed & manufactured LRUs is considered,the indigenous content would come as 35%.Fair enough,our industrial infrastructure is not as advanced as developed as some of the developing countries. WE can't expect Team LCA to set up a semiconductor fab facility,can we ?
No one would say Gripen is anyless Swedish,because it uses Motorola & TI processors in its FCS system.
